common.tagline: Ask questions about your own documents

auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to start asking questions about your documents

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.userExists: A user with this email already exists
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again
errors.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check that the API is running

chat.title: Chat
chat.emptyDescription: For example: "When does the washing machine warranty expire?" The answer arrives with links to source documents.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)
chat.askFailed: Failed to get an answer. Please try again
chat.deleteDescription: "{title}" and all of its messages will be permanently removed.

documents.title: Documents
documents.dropHere: Drag files here or click to browse
documents.dropHint: PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD — up to 50 MB
documents.unsupportedType: "{name}": this file type is not supported
documents.fileTooLarge: "{name}": the file is empty or larger than 50 MB
documents.emptyDescription: Upload your first document and you can ask questions about it in the chat.
documents.deleteDescription: "{name}" and all of its search data will be permanently removed.

profile.title: Profile
profile.settingsSoon: Profile settings — password change, account deletion — arrive in later milestones.
